case_title: LEE MOZELLE MRS VS TURNER MARY MRS

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,250.00 FILED BY LEE MOZELLE MRS AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER MARY MRS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
